transcript:
HCP: so i want to discuss your knee pain before the physio
Patient: yeah it's been really bad for ages
HCP: you've had a twist injury a few months back right?
Patient: yeah it happened at the gym
HCP: and since then you've been on panadol but it's not settling
Patient: no it's worse now when i go up stairs
HCP: that sounds like significant swelling and instability
Patient: exactly and i'm worried about the cartilage
HCP: i think we need to refer you to an Orthopaedic surgeon
Patient: ok is it an emergency
HCP: no not urgent but you need an MRI to check the meniscus
Patient: right i'll wait for the letter then
HCP: correct i'll send it to Orthopaedics and ask for a knee assessment
Patient: thanks doctor

specialty.evidence_span: refer you to an Orthopaedic surgeon

history.text: twist injury at gym a few months ago
history.evidence_span: you've had a twist injury a few months back right?
